General.Name: Dafeng Port Heshun Technology Co Ltd
General.Description: Yancheng Port International Co., Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading and petrochemical products storage businesses in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the trading, importing, and exporting electronic, petrochemical, and soybean products. It also trades in and provides supply chain management services; and storage services for petrochemical products. The company was formerly known as Dafeng Port Heshun Technology Company Limited and changed its name to Yancheng Port International Co., Limited in March 2025. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong. Yancheng Port International Co., Limited is a subsidiary of Dafeng Port Overseas Investment Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Exchange Tower, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
